title: minuartia palyzanica
intro: Minuartia palyzanica, also known as Palyzan's mouse-ear or mountain rock-cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Minuartia palyzanica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce fever. Minuartia palyzanica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile addition to herbal remedies for various health concerns.
